title: Clean up farm-build miscommit
body:
Followup to #20051, which I didn't review in time.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] -- I tested on my laptop, pinky promise

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Quick reminder that `podman farm` is special-cased in `xref-helpmsgs-manpages` because it is a hidden command.

In future updates to farm-build docs, I recommend temp-disabling `cmd/podman/farm/farm.go:farmCmd.Hidden = true` and manually running `hack/xref-helpmsgs-manpages`.
We should unhide it now.  Podman 5.0 is the main branch, so it should be seen.

LGTM 
But needs a new test.

> But needs a new test.

I totally deserved that!

Roger on your unhide, but not in this commit: CI would fail because of #20752, which is more surgery than I want to perform right now.
Little things bring me joy, asking @edsantiago to add a test...
